violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

Non-functional equipment (slicer) was observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per person in charge, an application was sent in today. Please email inspector proof of certification. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The dishwasher located in the ware-washing area was not in good repair. The dishwasher was not in service at time of inspection. Per person in charge, repair services are scheduled. Please email inspector proof of repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Dishwasher was taken out of service and must not be used until it is repaired/replaced/adjusted. Establishment is to use the 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Cheeseburgers and chicken sandwiches were observed held at 118-121 degrees Fahrenheit on the hot plate hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been transferred from the hot cabinet to the hot plate unit about a half hour prior. The temperature was turned up on the hot plate and food was reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The light bulb located in the hot plate unit was not in good repair. Light bulb must be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. Ice machine must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Deili meat was observed thawing in a container of stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
Food was observed thawing in the 3-bay sink. Establishment must not prepare/thaw food in the 3-bay sink to prevent contamination. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The floor in the ware-washing area is in poor repair (hole in the floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm and other debris. Ice machine must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
